generated_parts.label: Payload Optics Bench
generated_parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

requirements: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts
Removable payload module: optics bench, focal plane, thermal baffles, inspection window
Battery, sensor, actuator, cartridge, payload, cable, or joint modules remain removable without full teardown
Harnesses, tubes, or service channels are routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access is represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry (clamp, grommet, tie point) and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius away from moving joints and sharp edges
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Rails, PC/104 standoffs, payload bay, and board stack clearances are visible
Avionics, battery, antenna, and payload modules have removable trays or access panels
Design is an educational structural/electrical mockup and avoids flight qualification claims
Structure, power, avionics, comms, and payload are decomposed with simple mass/volume/power budget notes per module that sum consistently
